title: Project Engineer/C&S Engineer/Architectural Coordinator
description:
Office Location : Tai Seng

Working hours : Monday to Friday | 830am to 6pm | Saturday 830am to 12pm

Salary (commensurate with experience) : Up to $6000!! + Performance related Pay + Annual Leaves + Medical Benefits

Industry : Construction Sector - A&A / Building Works


Job Responsibilities:

• Review Drawings: Check architectural drawings for errors and coordination issues.

• Liaise with Consultants: Communicate with architects and engineers for clarifications and revisions.

• Coordination with Subcontractors: Ensure architectural works align with structural, M&E, and ID works.

• Site Inspections: Verify works comply with approved drawings and specifications.

• Resolve Issues: Address design conflicts, site constraints, and technical queries.

• Submission & Approvals: Prepare and submit documents for approvals (e.g., MOS, RA, shop drawings).

• Quality Control: Ensure materials and workmanship meet project standards.

• Progress Monitoring: Track architectural works to meet project timelines.

• Compliance: Ensure works comply with regulations and contract requirements.

• Handover Preparation: Assist in defect rectification and documentation for project completion.


Job Requirements:

•Candidate has at least 2 years of relevant working experiences that possess Degree in Construction, Civil Engineering and M&E or equivalent

•Knowledgeable in basic Autocad software

•Has positive attitude and sense of responsibilities

•Able to handle construction projects with commitment on work

•Good in communication and written abilities

•Required skill : Able to use Microsoft Project to present schedule to the clients


Maxhunt Resource Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 22C1322
Cynthia Lai | Registration No: R25146301

postedCompany.description:
MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
